title: rosa dumalis f. semiglandulosa
intro: Rosa dumalis f. semiglandulosa is a subspecies of the Rosa dumalis, a species of rose native to Europe and Western Asia. It is a flowering plant known for its fragrant, pink to purple flowers and is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties. Rosa dumalis f. semiglandulosa has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and other ailments, and its health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce fever and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Rosa dumalis f. semiglandulosa is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
